parity_scope: url is required and scheme must be http or https
hostnames resolve through SSRF guard before request and on redirect
loopback, private, link-local, reserved, multicast, unspecified, and unresolvable targets fail before file writes
download uses 30s timeout, browser-like user agent, referer, and stream cap of MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH plus one byte
magic validation accepts jpeg, png, gif, and webp only
filename uses sanitized URL basename or deterministic md5 hash fallback with MIME extension
thumbnail_only=true writes only _thumb.webp when thumbnail succeeds and falls back to original when thumbnail generation fails
all validation failures leave PRISM_GO_DATA_DIR/static/uploads unchanged
retained_python_scope: Markdown import remote image helper ownership

allowed_next_step.reason: Upload-url local/copied-data candidate is closed; the next active queue item is Go upload delete with original/thumbnail/reference checks.
